sections.paragraph:
(“retribution”), pr.n. Shallum, borne by-

(1) a king of the kingdom of Israel (773, 772, b.c.), -2 Ki. 15:1015 .-(2) a king of Judah, the son of Josiah and younger brother of kings Jehoiakim and Zedekiah; prob. the same as יְהֹואָחָז No. 2, Jer 22:11 see Rosenm. on the passage.-(3) the husband of Huldah the prophetess, 2Ki 22:14.-(4) other men, Ezr 2:42 7:2 10:24 , 42 Ezr 10:42 Neh 3:12 7:45 1Ch 2:40, etc.
